description_long: This object is a compact, wedge-shaped smart display device with a prominent rectangular touchscreen on its front face. The screen displays a digital clock interface with a background image, suggesting it is designed for both information display and multimedia use. The body is encased in a matte black material, with a textured fabric covering the rear and sides, providing a modern and tactile appearance. The front bezel is relatively thick and uniform, with rounded corners and a small circular camera located in the upper right corner of the screen. The back of the device is angled, allowing the screen to be propped up for easy viewing on flat surfaces. No physical buttons or brand logos are visible on any side of the device.
description: A wedge-shaped smart display with a touchscreen, black bezel, and fabric-textured rear, featuring a front-facing camera and no visible buttons or logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchscreen display, thick black bezel, and a small camera in the upper right corner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wedge-shaped profile and textured fabric covering the rear and side surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the angled, fabric-textured back with a flat base and no visible ports or buttons.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wedge profile and fabric texture, similar to the other side.
attribute_screen_presence: Visible rectangular screen occupying most of the front face, approximately 80% of the device's width and height, centered with a landscape orientation.
attribute_bezel_design: Uniform, thick black bezel with rounded corners, matte finish, and no visible texture or markings.
attribute_camera_location: Small camera located in the upper right corner of the front bezel, facing forward.
